meta.name: SPANE Scale of Positive and Negative Experience
meta.fullName: Scale of Positive and Negative Experience
meta.description: The SPANE is a 12-item measure of subjective well-being that assesses positive and negative feelings experienced over the past four weeks. It provides separate scores for positive experiences, negative experiences, and an overall affect balance.
meta.author: Diener, Wirtz, Tov, Kim-Prieto, Choi, Oishi & Biswas-Diener (2010)
meta.reference: Diener E, Wirtz D, Tov W, Kim-Prieto C, Choi D, Oishi S, Biswas-Diener R. New well-being measures: Short scales to assess flourishing and positive and negative feelings. Social Indicators Research. 2010;97(2):143-156.
meta.instruction: Please think about what you have been doing and experiencing during the past four weeks. Then report how much you experienced each of the following feelings, using the scale below.

ranges.label: Low Well-Being
ranges.description: Your overall emotional experience suggests low well-being. Negative feelings may be dominating your daily experience.
suggestions: Consider speaking with a mental health professional
Try to engage in activities that bring you joy or satisfaction
Reach out to supportive friends or family members
Practice small daily acts of self-care

ranges.label: Below Average Well-Being
ranges.description: Your emotional experience is below average. You may be experiencing more negative feelings than positive ones.
suggestions: Identify activities and situations that boost your positive emotions
Consider stress management techniques such as mindfulness or exercise
Monitor your emotional patterns over time
If feelings persist, consider consulting a counselor

ranges.label: Above Average Well-Being
ranges.description: Your emotional experience is above average, indicating a generally positive outlook with a good balance of feelings.
suggestions: Continue engaging in activities that bring positive experiences
Maintain your social connections and supportive relationships
Practice gratitude to reinforce positive emotional patterns

ranges.label: High Well-Being
ranges.description: Your emotional experience indicates high well-being. You frequently experience positive feelings and rarely experience negative ones.
suggestions: Keep up your healthy lifestyle and coping strategies
Continue to nurture the relationships and activities that support your well-being

positive.label: Low Positive Feelings
positive.description: You rarely experience positive emotions. Consider seeking ways to introduce more enjoyable activities into your life.

positive.label: Moderate Positive Feelings
positive.description: You sometimes experience positive emotions but there is room for improvement.

positive.label: High Positive Feelings
positive.description: You frequently experience positive emotions, indicating good emotional health.

positive.label: Very High Positive Feelings
positive.description: You very frequently experience positive emotions, reflecting excellent emotional well-being.

negative.label: Low Negative Feelings
negative.description: You rarely experience negative emotions, indicating good emotional health.

negative.label: Moderate Negative Feelings
negative.description: You sometimes experience negative emotions, which is within the normal range.

negative.label: High Negative Feelings
negative.description: You frequently experience negative emotions. Consider strategies to manage stress and difficult feelings.

negative.label: Very High Negative Feelings
negative.description: You very frequently experience negative emotions. Professional support is recommended.
